name: IRC_COMM_ACCOUNTS
description: Stores all the accounts of the communication providers.

columns.Name: COMM_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: FOOTER_TEXT_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: To enable or disable footer text in an outbound SMS message

columns.Name: FOOTER_TEXT
columns.Comments: Footer text in an oubound SMS message

columns.Name: ACCOUNT_GUID
columns.Comments: Application generated GUID of the provider account.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the communication provider account.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description for the communication provider account.

columns.Name: ACCOUNT_CONFIG
columns.Comments: Communication provider account  configuration information  including credentials of the account.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status of the communication provider account.The corresponding lookup type is IRC_COMM_ACCOUNT_STATUS_TYPE.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_MAX_LENGTH
columns.Comments: Max length for a message set by provider.

columns.Name: COMM_PROVIDER_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to IRC_COMM_PROVIDERS

columns.Name: DELETE_MSG_ON_READ_FLAG
columns.Comments: Determine whether the messages for this account should be delete after they are read.

columns.Name: ENABLE_TWO_WAY_COMM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Determine whether the messages for this account supports 2 way sms communication

columns.Name: AGENT_COMM_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether agent communication is enabled for the account or not.

columns.Name: COMM_ACCOUNT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the communication provider account.Determine whether account provider is Recruiting provider or Communicate provider.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
